## Problem

<!-- What gap or pain point does this address? Be concrete: a screen with no coverage, a gesture that has to be reimplemented inline every time, a missing CI signal, etc. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you build? If it's a new POM or spec, name the screen. If it's a helper, name the function and its signature. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches and why they're worse. "I considered X but it duplicates Y", etc. -->

## Notes

<!-- Optional: relevant links, prior art from other automation frameworks, sketches, or constraints to keep in mind. -->
